rows.label: qev041502_MSG0001
rows.name: Huh... who are you...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0002
rows.name: Hello! Lady![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ah! That Nopon from before!
Wow, what a blast from the past...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0004
rows.name:
It has been a long time, mo...
Wait, huh!? Lady![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0005
rows.name: You have hair growing on your head, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Huh?
Oh, this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0007
rows.name: When you think about it, we are B.B.s, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Honestly, hair is something we can easily swap out.
It is like a wig, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0009
rows.name: If anything, having my head turned completely bald gave me the perfect excuse to try out a new hairstyle. You know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ugh... I am a little shocked, mo...
I found the recipe for the medicine... and nearly died gathering incredibly rare materials for it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0011
rows.name:
I-I'm sorry...
I'm not entirely sure what you mean, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0012
rows.name:
Mmm...
But still! I want to properly compensate you, Lady, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0013
rows.name: Apologies, compensation, and sincerity are the fundamentals of business, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0014
rows.name:
I will go sell the materials I gathered for the medicine, mo!
It might not amount to 10,000 credits, but it will be a decent sum of money, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0015
rows.name: Huh? H-hold on...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0016
rows.name: Lady, I want you to wait just a little bit longer, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0017
rows.name: I will be right back with the money, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0018
rows.name: I said wait a second![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0019
rows.name: Mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0020
rows.name:
Don't worry about the money anymore...
You've more than proven your sincerity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0021
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0022
rows.name:
You went through all that trouble searching everywhere, didn't you?
And the fact that you'd immediately think to sell off something you worked so hard to gather...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0023
rows.name: Lady...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0024
rows.name:
I've really misjudged the Nopon!
You've got some serious merchant spirit in you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0025
rows.name: Out of respect for that spirit, we're calling it even. We're square![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0026
rows.name:
R-Really, mo!?
I am so grateful, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0027
rows.name: Work hard and become a top-tier merchant, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041502_MSG0028
rows.name:
Yes, mo!
When that time comes... I hope you become a regular customer, mo~~~![ST:wait ]
